description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages — test, deploy, and notify — using the node:carbon Docker image. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update and apt-get -y install zip, then executes yarn, yarn commitlint, yarn lint, yarn build:prod --no-progress, yarn build:dev --no-progress, yarn test --no-progress --code-coverage, yarn --cwd server, yarn --cwd devops/devopsadmin, yarn --cwd agent, yarn license:all, export BASE_URL=http://$(hostname -i):3000, yarn e2e, and yarn mdsp:zip; it sets MONGODB_URL and SELENIUM_URL variables, uses selenium/standalone-chrome:3.5.2 and mongo:3.2 services, and publishes JUnit XML reports from coverage/*.xml and test-reports/*.xml as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a mindsphere job that runs only on the master branch, downloads and installs the Cloud Foundry CLI, writes a ~/.cf/config.json with CF_API, CF_ACCESS_TOKEN and CF_REFRESH_TOKEN, then runs cf target -o "$CF_ORG" -s "$CF_SPACE_DEV", yarn, yarn build:prod --no-progress, yarn --cwd server, and finally cf push with --var mdspTenant="$MDSP_TENANT" --var mdspRegion="$MDSP_REGION" to deploy to Cloud Foundry. In the notify stage add a notify job that also runs only on master, uses the same node:carbon image, sets -euo pipefail, installs jq, obtains a CF_TOKEN via curl POST to $CF_TECHUSER_OAUTH_ENDPOINT with $CF_TECHUSER_CLIENT_ID and $CF_TECHUSER_CLIENT_SECRET, and posts a JSON email containing the CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME to $CF_API_PUBLISH_EMAIL_ENDPOINT addressed to $NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_ADDRESSES. All jobs inherit the node:carbon image, the deploy and notify jobs run in the dev environment, and the pipeline references the listed secret variables for Cloud Foundry authentication and notification.
